title: telis monspeliaca
intro: Telis monspeliaca, also known as Thapsia monspeliaca, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Telis monspeliaca include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in homeopathic medicine to treat various health conditions.
